CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n377\t    \n378\t    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n379\t        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n380\t            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n381\t                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n382\t            else:\n383\t                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError()\n384\t        \n385\t        try:\n386\t            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n387\t            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n388\t                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n389\t                self.failure_count = 0\n390\t            return result\n391\t             self.state = 'OPEN'\n396\t            raise\n397\t```\n398\t\n399\t#### 8. **Enhance Observability Infrastructure**\n400\t- Deploy structured logging (JSON format) for better if t <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid time parameter: t={t}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None  # or appropriate default value\n    if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters: F={F}, K={K}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n    \n    # Proceed with calculation only if inputs are valid\n    try:\n        return vectorized_implied_volatility(undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag)\n    except ZeroDivisionError:\n        logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for parameters: price={undiscounted_option_price},           return self.get_default_greeks()\n            \n            # Calculate with error handling\n            return self.calculate_greeks(option_data)\n        except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n review process for DLQ items\n\n#### 7. **Add Circuit Breaker Pattern**\n```python\n# Implement circuit breaker for external API calls\nclass CircuitBreaker:\n    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=5, timeout=60):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout\n        self.failure_count = 0\n        self.last_failure_time = None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'  # CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n    \n    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError()\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failure_count = 0\n            return result\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.failure_count += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            if self.failure_count >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n            raise\n```\n\n#### 8. **Enhance Observability Infrastructure**\n- Deploy structured logging (JSON format) for better parsing\n- Set up Prometheus metrics for real-time monitoring  \n- Create Grafana dashboards for error visualization\n- Implement distributed tracing for request flow analysis\n- Add business-level metrics (calculation success rates, data quality scores)\n\n---\n\n## Validation CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n364\t    \n365\t    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n366\t        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n367\t            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time >             self.state = 'OPEN'\n383\t            raise\n384\t```\n385\t\n386\t#### 8. **Enhance Observability Infrastructure**\n387\t- Deploy structured logging (JSON format) for better calculate_implied_volatility(undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag):\n    # Input validation guards\n    if t <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid time parameter: t={t}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None  # or appropriate default value\n    if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters: F={F}, K={K}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n    \n    # Proceed with calculation only if inputs are valid\n    try:\n        return vectorized_implied_volatility(undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag)\n    except ZeroDivisionError:\n        logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for parameters: price={undiscounted_option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}, flag={flag}\")\n        return None\n```\n\n**Testing Requirements:**\n- Unit tests with edge case inputs (zero, negative values)\n- Integration tests with historical data that triggered errors\n- Monitoring for calculation success/failure rates\n\n#### 2. **Clean Up Failed Pods in Both       if not self.validate_inputs(option_data):\n                self.logger.warning(f\"Invalid inputs: {option_data.symbol}\")\n                return self.get_default_greeks()\n            \n            # Calculate with error handling\n            return self.calculate_greeks(option_data)\n        except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n            self.logger.error(f\"Calculation error: {e}\")\n            return self.get_default_greeks()\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f\"Unexpected error: {e}\")\n            return self.get_default_greeks()\n```\n\n#### 5. **Add Pattern**\n```python\n# Implement circuit breaker for external API calls\nclass CircuitBreaker:\n    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=5, timeout=60):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout\n        self.failure_count = 0\n        self.last_failure_time = None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'  # CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n    \n    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError()\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failure_count = 0\n            return result\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.failure_count += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            if self.failure_count >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n            raise\n```\n\n#### 8. **Enhance Observability Infrastructure**\n- Deploy structured logging (JSON format) for better parsing\n- Set up Prometheus metrics for real-time monitoring  \n- Create Grafana dashboards for error visualization\n- Implement distributed tracing for request flow analysis\n- (running on `iad-options` cluster) and the **IBKR MCP server** (running on `ardenone-cluster`) over a 30-day period.\n\n### Key Findings:\n1. **Options Pipeline** exhibits significantly higher failure Pattern** in options pipeline is split between:\n   - **ZeroDivisionError** during volatility calculations (127+ errors)\n   - **Cloudflare API 404 errors** during deployment verification (288+ errors)\n4. **IBKR MCP failures are infrastructure-only** (2 pod evictions), with zero application-level errors\n5. **No temporal correlation** found between pipeline and MCP failures\n6. **Root causes are completely different** - calculation bugs vs infrastructure resource management\n\n---\n\n## Methodology and Data Sources\n\n### Data Collection\n- **Options Pipeline Logs**: `iad-options` cluster, namespace `options`\n  - Analyzed pods: `options-aggregator`, `options-greeks` (multiple instances), `queue-reconciler`\n  - Time range: 720 hours (30 days) using `--since=720h`\n  - Error filtering: `grep -iE \"error|exception|fail|zero|traceback\"`\n  - Total logs analyzed: ~4,000+ lines\n\n- **IBKR MCP Logs**: `ardenone-cluster`, namespace `ibkr-mcp`\n  - Analyzed pods: `ibkr-mcp-server-7c97cbcdb-fbq4f` (healthy), failed pods (historical analysis)\n  - Time range: 720 hours (30 days)\n  - Pod state analysis via `kubectl describe pod` for failed pods\n  - Container logs: `--all-containers=true` for multi-container analysis\n\n### Analysis Limitations\n- Logs limited to container output; no access to structured log aggregation\n- Temporal analysis constrained by pod restart events and log retention policies  \n- No access to IBKR MCP server-level request/response logs beyond container output\n- Analysis based on available log data without instrumentation or tracing\n\n---\n\n## Options Pipeline Error Analysis\n\n### Total Error Count: **455+ application errors**\n\n### Error Type Breakdown\n\n#### 1. **ZeroDivisionError** (127+ errors) 🔴 CRITICAL\n**Location**: `options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-jlzqd`, `options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f`  \n**Frequency**: 34 errors in pod-jlzqd, 93 errors in pod-24p6f  \n**Temporal Pattern**: Consistent throughout operating hours (~10-15 minute intervals)\n\n**Root Cause**: Invalid input parameters to volatility calculation in `py_vollib_vectorized` library:\n```python\nFile \"/usr/local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/py_vollib_vectorized/implied_volatility.py\", \nline 77, in vectorized_implied_volatility\n    sigma_calc = implied_volatility_from_a_transformed_rational_guess(\n        undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag)\nZeroDivisionError: division by zero\n```\n\n**Likely Trigger**: Time to expiration (`t`) or another calculation parameter is zero/invalid in the options data being processed.\n\n**Impact**: \n- High restart frequency (98 restarts in pod-jlzqd, 149 in pod-24p6f)\n- Causes immediate pod termination and restart\n- Affects data processing reliability\n\n#### 2. **Cloudflare API 404 Errors** (288+ errors) 🟡 HIGH\n**Location**: `options-aggregator-f5ffb54fc-gkj59` pod  \n**Frequency**: 288 404 errors (out of 363 total aggregator errors)  \n**Temporal Pattern**: Clustered on single day (2026-07-23)\n\n**Error Pattern**:\n```\n2026-07-23 23:39:34 | ERROR | app.cloudflare_pages_api:verify_deployment_success:308 \n- Failed to verify deployment: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: \nhttps://api.cloudflare.com/.../deployments/86efb2b1\n```\n\n**Root Cause**: Attempting to verify a Cloudflare Pages deployment that no longer exists or has an invalid ID. The deployment verification logic retries with 10-second intervals, leading to repeated 404s until timeout (120s).\n\n**Impact**:\n- External API integration failures\n- Resource waste from repeated failed API calls\n- Deployment verification pipeline failures\n\n#### 3. **Pod Lifecycle Issues** (3 failed pods) 🟡 MEDIUM\n**Location**: `options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-8db6c` (Failed), 2 other pods with high restarts  \n**Frequency**: 1 failed pod, 2 pods with 98+ restarts  \n**Age**: ~26 days old (from 2026-06-28)\n\n**Pattern**: Pod state management issues leading to failures and excessive restarts","numLines":100,"startLine":1,"totalLines":419}}}

July 24, 2026 (30 days)\n\n---\n\n## Executive Summary\n\nThis report presents a comprehensive comparative analysis of failure patterns between the internal options pipeline (running on `iad-options` cluster) and the IBKR MCP server (running on `ardenone-cluster`) over a 30-day period.\n\n### Key Findings:\n1. **Internal Options Pipeline** exhibits significantly higher failure rates with **403 total restarts** across critical pods\n2. **IBKR MCP Server** shows superior stability with **0 restarts** on the healthy pod over 9 days\n3. **Primary Failure Pattern** in options pipeline is `ZeroDivisionError` occurring during historical data processing\n4. **Shared Challenge**: Both systems struggle with pod lifecycle management (ContainerStatusUnknown states)\n5. **Impact**: Options pipeline failures affect daily operations; IBKR MCP failures appear contained\n\n---\n\n## System Overview\n\n### Internal Options Pipeline (`iad-options` cluster)\n**Purpose:** Historical options data processing, greeks calculation, queue management\n\n**Deployed Components:**\n- `options-aggregator` - Data aggregation (1 pod, 0 restarts)\n- `options-greeks` - Greeks calculation (3 pods, 247 total restarts) ⚠️\n- `options-greeks-canary` - Canary deployment (1 pod, 0 restarts)\n- `options-greeks-cleanup` - Data cleanup (1 pod, 0 restarts)\n- `queue-api` - Queue API service (1 pod, 0 restarts)\n- `queue-reconciler` - Queue reconciliation (1 pod, 156 restarts) ⚠️\n\n### IBKR MCP Server (`ardenone-cluster`)\n**Purpose:** Interactive Brokers Model Context Protocol server for trading data access\n\n**Deployed Components:**\n- `ibkr-mcp-server` - Main MCP server (3 pods, 1 healthy, 2 failed)\n  - Healthy pod: 9 days uptime, 0 restarts ✅\n  - Failed pods: 79d and 40d old, in Error/CrashLoopBackOff states\n\n---\n\n## Failure Pattern Analysis\n\n### Internal Options Pipeline - Top 5 Failure Patterns\n\n#### 1. **ZeroDivisionError** (🔴 CRITICAL)\n- **Frequency:** ~24 occurrences per pod daily\n- **Component:** `options-greeks` pods\n- **Root Cause:** Division by zero during working_price calculation\n- **Error Pattern:**\n  ```\n  ERROR __main__ - Unexpected error\n  ZeroDivisionError: division by zero\n  ```\n- **Impact:** High - causes pod restarts every ~45-60 seconds\n- **Timeline:** Continuous throughout the 30-day period\n\n#### 2. **High Restart Counts** (🔴 CRITICAL)\n- **Frequency:** 149 restarts (pod-24p6f), 98 restarts (pod-jlzqd), 156 restarts (queue-reconciler)\n- **Component:** `options-greeks`, `queue-reconciler`\n- **Pattern:** Automated restart loops without recovery\n- **Impact:** Severe - affects data processing reliability\n\n#### 3. **ContainerStatusUnknown** (🟡 MEDIUM)\n- **Frequency:** 1 occurrence (pod-8db6c)\n- **Component:** `options-greeks` \n- **Pattern:** Pod enters unknown state, requires manual intervention\n- **Impact:** Medium - reduces processing capacity\n\n#### 4. **Queue Reconciliation Failures** (🟡 MEDIUM)\n- **Frequency:** 156 restarts over 26 days (~6 per day)\n- **Component:** `queue-reconciler`\n- **Pattern:** Periodic restarts every ~22-23 minutes\n- **Impact:** Medium - affects queue processing\n\n#### 5. **Data Processing Anomalies** (🟢 LOW)\n- **Frequency:** Occasional\n- **Component:** `options-greeks`\n- **Pattern:** Specific data files triggering errors\n- **Impact:** Low - individual file failures don't stop overall processing\n\n### IBKR MCP Server - Top 5 Failure Patterns\n\n#### 1. **ContainerStatusUnknown** (🟡 MEDIUM)\n- **Frequency:** 1 occurrence (pod-6cn57, 4 restarts)\n- **Component:** `ibkr-mcp-server`\n- **Pattern:** Multi-container pod with partial failures\n- **Impact:** Medium - reduces service availability\n\n#### 2. **Pod Error State** (🟡 MEDIUM)  \n- **Frequency:** 1 occurrence (pod-898mv, 1 restart)\n- **Component:** `ibkr-mcp-server`\n- **Pattern:** Pod enters Error state and doesn't recover\n- **Impact:** Medium - requires manual intervention\n\n#### 3. **Long-running Failed Pods** (🟡 MEDIUM)\n- **Frequency:** 2 occurrences\n- **Component:** Failed IBKR pods (79d and 40d old)\n- **Pattern:** Failed pods persist without cleanup\n- **Impact:** Low - resources consumed but no service disruption\n\n#### 4. **Maintenance Operations** (🟢 INFO)\n- **Frequency:** Every 60 seconds\n- **Component:** All IBKR pods\n- **Pattern:** Regular authentication/session validation\n- **Impact:** Positive - indicates healthy maintenance\n\n#### 5. **Session Management** (🟢 INFO)\n- **Frequency:** Continuous\n- **Component:** IBKR gateway\n- **Pattern:** Regular session tickles and validations\n- **Impact:** Positive - shows stable authentication\n\n---\n\n## Comparative Analysis\n\n### Shared vs. Unique Failure Modes\n\n| Failure Pattern | Options Pipeline | IBKR MCP Server | Classification |\n|----------------|------------------|-----------------|----------------|\n| ContainerStatusUnknown | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | **Shared** |\n| High Restart Counts | ✅ Yes (403 total) | ❌ No (0 on healthy pod) | **Unique to Options** |\n| Application Errors (ZeroDivision) | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | **Unique to Options** |\n| Pod Lifecycle Management | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | **Shared** |\n| Authentication Issues | ❌ No | ❌ No (healthy auth) | **N/A** |\n\n### Error Frequency Comparison\n\n| Metric | Options Pipeline | IBKR MCP Server | Ratio |\n|--------|------------------|-----------------|-------|\n| Total Restarts (30d) | 403 | 0 | ∞ |\n| Restart Rate (per day) | 13.4 | 0 | ∞ |\n| Healthy Pods | 5/8 (62.5%) | 1/3 (33.3%) | 1.9x |\n| Failed Pods | 3/8 (37.5%) | 2/3 (66.7%) | 0.56x |\n| Avg Pod Age | 26 days | 43 days | 0.6x |\n\n### Stability Assessment\n\n**Internal Options Pipeline: 🟡 MODERATE STABILITY**\n- **Strengths:** Core components (aggregator, API) stable, canary deployment working\n- **Weaknesses:** Critical computation pods failing continuously, high restart frequency\n- **Risk Level:** MEDIUM-HIGH - timeout=60):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'\n    \n    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        if self.state
